meta.summary: fpocket 4.2.3 protein pocket detection suite with fpocket, mdpocket, dpocket, and tpocket.
meta.description: fpocket 4.2.3 protein pocket detection suite with fpocket, mdpocket, dpocket, and tpocket.

test: { fpocket 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F "fpocket" >/dev/null && { mdpocket 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F "mdpocket" >/dev/null && { dpocket 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F "dpocket" >/dev/null && { tpocket 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F "tpocket" >/dev/null
for cmd in fpocket mdpocket dpocket tpocket; do ldd "$(command -v "$cmd")" 2>&1 | grep -F "not found" && exit 1 || true; done

tmp=/tmp/taf-fpocket-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cp /opt/fpocket/share/testdata/1UYD.pdb "$tmp/"; cd "$tmp"; fpocket -f 1UYD.pdb >/tmp/taf-fpocket-fpocket.log 2>&1; test -s 1UYD_out/1UYD_info.txt; grep -F "Pocket" 1UYD_out/1UYD_info.txt >/dev/null; test -s 1UYD_out/1UYD_out.pdb; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-fpocket-fpocket.log

tmp=/tmp/taf-fpocket-cif-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cp /opt/fpocket/share/testdata/1UYD.cif "$tmp/"; cd "$tmp"; fpocket -f 1UYD.cif >/tmp/taf-fpocket-cif.log 2>&1; test -s 1UYD_out/1UYD_info.txt; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-fpocket-cif.log

tmp=/tmp/taf-mdpocket-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cp /opt/fpocket/share/testdata/mdpocket/*.pdb "$tmp/"; sed "s#^#$tmp/#" /opt/fpocket/share/testdata/mdpocket/input.txt > "$tmp/input.txt"; cd "$tmp"; mdpocket --pdb_list input.txt -f 2yex.pdb -o mdpout >/tmp/taf-mdpocket.log 2>&1; test -s mdpout_freq_iso_0_5.pdb; test -s mdpout_dens_iso_8.pdb; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-mdpocket.log

tmp=/tmp/taf-dpocket-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cp /opt/fpocket/share/testdata/3LKF.pdb /opt/fpocket/share/testdata/1ATP.pdb /opt/fpocket/share/testdata/7TAA.pdb "$tmp/"; printf "%s\t%s\n" "$tmp/3LKF.pdb" pc "$tmp/1ATP.pdb" atp "$tmp/7TAA.pdb" abc > "$tmp/list.txt"; cd "$tmp"; dpocket -f list.txt >/tmp/taf-dpocket.log 2>&1; test -s dpout_explicitp.txt || test -s dpout_fpocketp.txt; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-dpocket.log

upstream.name: fpocket
upstream.citation: Le Guilloux V, Schmidtke P, Tuffery P. Fpocket: an open source platform for ligand pocket detection. BMC Bioinformatics. 2009;10:168.
